notes: Copy this file to protocol_probe.local.json for local experiments.
The local file is gitignored and is read on every command, so editing probes does not require script reload.

tactics-three.description: Send opcode 0xA7 with three u8 fields.

target-clear.description: The first command argument overrides creatureId.

raw-ping-empty.description: Raw sends exact bytes, including the opcode.
